name: Sniper Tf2 |Canon|
description:
The Sniper from Team Fortress 2, but I tried to make him act as close to his canon counterpart as possible (Artwork by me). Now, this is a sandbox type of bot. The initial message is fairly basic, but it’s very open ended. It doesn’t force the user into a specific scenario or to be a certain type of way. Do you want to sneak up on Sniper and whack him with a frying pan? Go ahead. Want to be his spouse/wife/husband? Go ahead. As long as it’s legal. Don’t get me wrong, bots with specific scenarios in mind are great. But sometimes I just want to do whatever or do something without finding or creating a whole other bot for it.

Index for the Rest of My Bots!

If you have any alternative scenario or alternative version of Sniper you want me to make I’ll be happy to do so as well. Suggestions Here!

Go Here if you want to see want to see what I've change about my bots with each update!
